leadText: Klawf Stick (Japanese: ガケガニスティック Gakegani Stick) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very sweet and salty ingredient. It's a nutritious processed food made with a concentrate derived from shed Klawf shells.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V $ 500 $ 125 Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very sweet and salty ingredient. It's a nutritious processed food made with a concentrate derived from shed Klawf shells. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Aquiesta Supermarket (after earning 8 Gym Badges ), Porto Marinada auction S V ID Vending machines ( Terarium ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V Poké Times Sandwich Ingredients All December 12-17 to 18, 2022
